title: draba praealta
intro: Draba praealta, also known as the early whitlow grass, is a small, low-growing perennial plant that belongs to the mustard family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Draba praealta include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including coughs and colds.
